title: A3 White Board - Perfect for Small Offices!
features: This useful dry erase whiteboard and pen by Anker Stationery measures 405mm x 305mm (15.9" x 12").
Comes with a whiteboard front and additional reinforced grey plastic border with round corners for protection.
Dry wipe marker pen also included with holder on the whiteboard.
Mounting options included to hang as landscape or portrait.
Perfect for writing plans, reminders, to do lists at home or in the office.
